Required header for every .ts / .tsx / .js / .jsx / .mjs / .cjs / .scss file
(must appear within the first 10 lines — after a shebang or directive like
"use client" is fine):

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0
// SPDX-FileCopyrightText: © 2026 [YOUR NAME, or "ribosome contributors"]

Required header for every .css file (CSS has no line-comment syntax):

/* SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0 */
/* SPDX-FileCopyrightText: © 2026 [YOUR NAME, or "ribosome contributors"] */

Enforced by scripts/check-spdx-headers.js via the pre-commit hook in
.githooks/. Run `bun run spdx:fix` to insert missing headers automatically.
